data.summary: [7/9 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-ga
data.body:
[7/9 (Tue) Ban Notice]  

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.  

▶ Total number of players banned: 20
📷 Period: Permanent 📷https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2599860

#BlueArchive
